data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Amazon uses extensive encryption mechanisms to protect data both in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption standard for data at rest, TLS for secure data transmission.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Strong IAM protocols ensure that access to data and systems is restricted to authorized users.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) and fine-grained permission policies.

data.title: Advanced Threat Detection
data.description: Amazon utilizes AI-driven systems to continuously monitor and respond to security threats.
data.technical_spec: AWS GuardDuty and Machine Learning models for anomaly detection.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust DDoS mitigation strategies to ensure availability and performance of services.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced for automated DDoS defense.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security assessments and patch management to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning tools and centralized patch management workflow.
